results.title: Son-in-law gives lame excuse for not delivering card
results.description: Dear Eric: I had a Mother's Day card for my daughter, but needed her sons, ages 10 and 7 to sign it. Since I did not see them in time for Mother's Day, I gave it to my daughter to...

results.title: Teo alleges manipulated posters aimed at undermining PH support
results.description: KUALA LUMPUR: Johor DAP chairman Teo Nie Ching today alleged that certain parties manipulated posters of potential candidates to undermine support for Pakatan Harapan (PH) in the Johor election.

results.description: Scotland fans have drawn praise for their conduct in the US during the World Cup.
